title: Resolve vacuum-current condition: JV3: J_V far-zone current flux
description: Sector: J_V. Allowed condition: I_V = 0 in ordinary exterior unless a future current law derives a neutral transport meaning. Forbidden condition: nonzero 1/r^2 far-zone current flux shifts or mimics exterior mass. Consequence: A far-zone vacuum current cannot become a second mass flux coin..
